notes: Takes an accusative object (the person being encouraged) and often the preposition 'zu' with a dative noun or infinitive clause.

sentences.german: Die Lehrerin ermutigt ihre Schüler, mehr Fragen zu stellen.
sentences.english: The teacher encourages her students to ask more questions.

sentences.german: Sein Lob hat mich sehr ermutigt.
sentences.english: His praise encouraged me a lot.

sentences.german: Der Trainer ermutigt die Spieler zu mehr Einsatz.
sentences.english: The coach encourages the players to put in more effort.
